news.t: Global X ETFs Announces Eight ETF Reverse Stock Splits

holdings.infoBox: SDEM is an equity ETF with a total of 69 individual holdings. The top holdings are Innolux stock at 2.95%, GRUPO CIBEST at 2.40%, EVA Airways at 2.33%, AIR ARABIA PJSC at 2.22%, and BB Seguridade Participações at 2.18%.

overview.description: The Global X MSCI SuperDividend Emerging Markets ETF (SDEM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high dividend yield equity. The fund follows an equal-weighted index of emerging market countries. The index selects stocks by highest dividend yield, excluding those ranking low on price return. SDEM was launched on Mar 17, 2015 and is issued by Global X.

data.title: Global X ETFs Announces Eight ETF Reverse Stock Splits
data.text: NEW YORK , Nov. 18, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Global X ETFs, the New York-based provider of exchange traded funds (ETFs), today announced a reverse split of the following eight funds: Fund Split Ratio Glob...
